Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 065 [recipes?][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...] ša₂-a-ri ZI ina pa-x-ri-šu₂ ša₂ GU₄ im-x

[...] expelling wind when he ... that a ghost ....

flake 2'2'

[...] x MER-šu₂ ina A MUN!(GU) u₂x-LU ina A GAZI⸢sar⸣

[...] ..., in salt water, ...-plant in mustard juice

flake 3'3'

[...] U₄ KU-šu₂ LAL₃ GAZIsar ŠEŠ₂-su

[...] you anoint it ... honey (and) mustard.

flake 4'4'

[...] x U₂ DI na₄gab-u₂ AL.TIL ina I₃ ḫal-ṣa ŠEŠ₂-su

You anoint it [...] ... complete alum in filtered oil.

flake 5'5'

[...] ša₂-a-ri ZIaḫ u bu-bu-uʾ-tu₄

[...] expellin wind and boil(s)

flake 6'6'

[...] ma-li-i ana ša₂-qi₂ ta-tur-ru

[...] full [...] in order to give to drink you turn

flake 7'7'

[...] x GIN₂ na₄gab-u₂ šal-šu₂ ša₂

[...] ... shekel(s) of alum, one-third of

flake 8'8'

[...] x U₂-ḪI.A ŠEŠ-MEŠ

[...] ... these plants

flake 9'9'

[...] ina KAŠ ŠE.BAR ḪI.ḪI TAG.TAG-su

[...] you mix in barley-beer (and then) you anoint him.

flake 10'10'

[...] x ina I₃ ḪI.ḪI TAG.TAG-su

[...] ... you mix in oil (and then) you anoint him.

flake 11'11'

[...] x E ḪAL i-ṣi

[...] ... few ...

flake 12'12'

[...] x AN x [x] x [...]

[...] ... [...]

(end surface missing)
